data.text: `CloseSatisfied` only carries a yes/no and always applies a `StatusClosed` transition today. I’m checking whether there’s already a plan field for alternate terminal targets; if not, I’ll add the smallest extension needed so “all cancelled” can land as `StatusCancelled` without changing unrelated reconcile behavior.

   163	func TestReconcile_ClosesEpicAfterImportedChildClose(t *testing.T) {
   164		s := newTestStore(t)

   166			ID:        "ddx-reconcile-epic",

   169		}

   172		require.NoError(t, s.Create(testCtx(), child))
   173	
   174		require.NoError(t, s.SetLifecycleStatus(child.ID, StatusClosed, LifecycleTransitionOptions{ManualClose: true}))
   175	
   176		before, err := s.Get(testCtx(), epic.ID)
   177		require.NoError(t, err)
   178		assert.Equal(t, StatusOpen, before.Status)
   179	
   180		plans, err := s.ReconcileLifecycleMetadata(ReconcileOptions{Apply: true})
   181		require.NoError(t, err)
   182		require.Len(t, plans, 1)
   183		assert.Equal(t, epic.ID, plans[0].BeadID)
   184		assert.Equal(t, StatusClosed, plans[0].TargetStatus)
   185		assert.True(t, plans[0].CloseSatisfied)
   186		assert.True(t, plans[0].Applied)
   187	
   188		got, err := s.Get(testCtx(), epic.ID)
   189		require.NoError(t, err)
   190		assert.Equal(t, StatusClosed, got.Status)
   191	
   192		events, err := s.Events(epic.ID)
   193		require.NoError(t, err)
   194		found := false
   195		for _, e := range events {
   196			if e.Kind == "epic_auto_close" {
   197				found = true
   198				assert.Contains(t, e.Body, "all_children_terminal")
   199				break
   200			}
   201		}
   202		assert.True(t, found, "epic should have epic_auto_close event after reconcile")
   203	}

data.text:
Implemented the epic reconcile safety net in [`cli/internal/bead/reconcile.go`](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-846934bc-20260607T142727-8ec157aa/cli/internal/bead/reconcile.go#L120):

- `ReconcileLifecycleMetadata` now threads per-parent child totals, non-terminal counts, and closed-child counts into `planLifecycleReconcile`.
- `planLifecycleReconcile` now emits a terminal epic repair when all children are terminal:
  - closes the epic when at least one child is closed,
  - cancels it when all children are cancelled.
- The apply path now uses `TargetStatus` for terminal reconcile transitions and emits the `epic_auto_close` event for epic auto-repairs.

Added the acceptance coverage in [`cli/internal/bead/reconcile_test.go`](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-846934bc-20260607T142727-8ec157aa/cli/internal/bead/reconcile_test.go#L105):

- `TestPlanLifecycleReconcile_ClosesAllTerminalEpic`
- `TestPlanLifecycleReconcile_SkipsEpicWithOpenChild`
- `TestPlanLifecycleReconcile_AllCancelledChildrenCancelsEpic`
- `TestReconcile_ClosesEpicAfterImportedChildClose`

Verification:
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... -run 'TestPlanLifecycleReconcile|TestReconcile_ClosesEpic'`
- `lefthook run pre-commit`

Commit:
- `20106f306 fix: reconcile auto-closes terminal epics [ddx-846934bc]`
